entries.name: Ghost
entries.description: Desktop automation: 29 screen perception and input control tools. Windows-first.

entries.name: Shadow
entries.description: Screen and audio capture, OCR, proactive engine, semantic memory and search.

entries.name: Exa
entries.description: Neural search: find any content on the web. Requires EXA_API_KEY.

entries.name: Headroom
entries.description: Context compression (chopratejas/headroom): compress tool outputs, logs, files, and RAG chunks. 60-95% fewer tokens, reversible retrieval. Requires headroom-ai[mcp].

entries.name: Checklist
entries.description: Interactive checklist widget: tick off, edit inline, and approve items in chat.

entries.name: Smart Intake Form
entries.description: Pre-filled intake form widget with native pickers and validation.

entries.name: Data Grid Explorer
entries.description: Sortable, filterable, virtualized data grid widget; full rows stay out of model context.

entries.name: Chart Studio
entries.description: Interactive chart widget (line/bar/area/scatter) with legend toggles and brush select.

entries.name: Decision Wizard
entries.description: Step-by-step decision flow widget (quiz/weighted/compare) with a running tally.

entries.name: Quest Board
entries.description: Kanban quest board widget backed by the quests subsystem.

entries.name: Worktree Diff Review
entries.description: Per-file, per-hunk diff review widget backed by Core's git-native worktree/diff/apply.

entries.name: Gateway Budget Dial
entries.description: Radial spent-vs-limit budget meter widget; the literal Gateway moat surface.
